elements.original_description: A person standing at a crossroads, one path bright and golden with coins and upward arrows, the other dark and shadowy with a cozy armchair and a blanket. The person hesitates, looking toward the dark path. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person standing at a crossroads in a minimalist conceptual scene on a pure white background. One path is bright and golden, scattered with coins and glowing upward arrows under warm, hopeful lighting. The other path is dark and shadowy, featuring a cozy armchair draped with a soft blanket under dim, subdued lighting. The person is hesitant, their body language showing uncertainty as they look toward the dark path. Cinematic lighting with sharp focus on the person and the contrasting paths, evoking a mood of caution and emotional tension as suggested by 'fear makes it feel safest.' No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. High resolution, professional composition.
